column1: SoCal Buy % strike zone 2024 UPDATE Q1/Q2
San Bernardino County Max % (less your fee & less adjustments)
*if more rural or not in general housing tracts be under lower %
** views, proximity to lakes, design & street access all yield premiums
*buyer pool prefers yucca valley, Joshua tree & 29 palms in populated areas close to the hwy
*if subject property does not have pool, do NOT make adjustment to add pool just use non pool comp

*if property is manufactured on land be below these %’s
*if property has full ocean views 180 degree+ be on the lower end as rehab is more
*this area is heavy MFR, targets here are LAR1.5+ for zoning (case by case)
*if property is built 1900s-1930s and is craftsman or Spanish style we can push on %’s
*if property is built 1900s-1930s and is craftsman or Spanish style we can push on %’s
*make adjustments accordingly to lot size and size of home for rehab cost
*make further adjustments for any properties that are rural in these areas
*properties need to be in populated areas/tracts, pass on middle of nowhere properties
*Close to the water we go the bigger the spread we need & comp views w/views
